columns.name: game_id
columns.comment: Identifies the unique game within the NFL schedule where the player performed a specific role.

columns.name: play_id
columns.comment: Denotes the specific play within the game, allowing for detailed tracking of player involvement.

columns.name: season
columns.comment: Represents the year of the NFL season in which the game takes place, helping to track performance over different years.

columns.name: season_type
columns.comment: Indicates whether the season is regular, preseason, or postseason, providing context for the game's significance.

columns.name: week
columns.comment: Specifies the week number of the NFL season during which the game occurred, useful for analyzing player performance trends.

columns.name: game_type
columns.comment: Describes the nature of the game, such as whether it is a home or away game, which can impact player performance.

columns.name: player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player, allowing for precise tracking of individual contributions across games.

columns.name: player_name
columns.comment: Full name of the player, making it easy to identify the athlete associated with a specific role in each game.

columns.name: role
columns.comment: Details the specific role or position the player fulfilled during the game, crucial for understanding player duties and impact.

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.comment: Records the timestamp of when the data was ingested into the system, important for data versioning and tracking updates.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.comment: References the original source file from which this player role data was extracted, aiding in data provenance and integrity.
